title: onobroma calvum
intro: Onobroma calvum, also known as the bald cocoa or cocoa de montaña, is a plant species belonging to the family Malpighiaceae. Traditionally, the bark of this plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Onobroma calvum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Onobroma calvum are often made by infusing the bark in hot water to create a tea or by mixing the bark with other herbs to create a decoction.
